title: Items Cooldown
description: Show Items Cooldown for any item
body:
⏱️ **Items Cooldown — Cooldown Timer On Items + HUD**

Tired of guessing when your item is ready again?  
`Items Cooldown` shows cooldowns directly on item icons and can also display them in clean HUD panels.

The mod displays cooldowns as **whole seconds only** (`round`) on items in both hotbar and inventory.

✨ **Features:**  
🔢 Integer-only cooldown values  
🌈 Color gradient from **red** (max cooldown) to **green** (min cooldown)  
📦 Supports any item with cooldowns, including modded items  
🧍 Personal cooldown HUD via `/hudculd my`

⚔️ Enemy cooldown HUD via `/hudculd enem` `(ONLY FunTime)`

🖱️ HUD panels can be moved and resized while chat is open  
🎨 Fully configurable via **Mod Menu + Cloth Config**  
👀 High readability: custom font, outline, background, text scale, offsets, and clean HUD design

🎯 **Why use it:**  
Instantly see when your item is ready to use again  
Track important enemy cooldowns during PvP  
Great for PvP and fast-paced gameplay  
Cleaner than guessing cooldowns manually

🛠️ **Compatibility:**  
Works on **Fabric**  
Supported Minecraft version: **1.21.4**  
Requires: **Fabric API**, **Cloth Config**  
Optional (for config screen): **Mod Menu**

📌 **Usage:**  
Open `Mod Menu -> Items Cooldown -> Configure`  
Adjust hotbar/inventory visibility and text style options  
Use an item with cooldown — the timer appears on the item icon  
Use `/hudculd my` to toggle your cooldown HUD  
Use `/hudculd enem` to toggle enemy cooldown HUD  
Open chat to move or resize HUD panels

📩 For questions and bug reports: Telegram / Discord — **@b1nt1n**
